summary: End-to-end testing of PlugDrop.ai agent knowledge-base rewrite (iteration 3). All 9 specialist agent cards render with the NEW role labels exactly as specified. Each agent's detail panel shows the correct role + intro greeting. Token-overlap matcher returns topically relevant answers for all 9 probe questions (Ava sales, Sophia complaints, Iris brand monitoring/flag, Ronan finance, Atlas reports, Mira reviews, Kai onboarding+automation, Luna customer journeys, Neo competitor/market intelligence). Backend /api/demo-request POST works (200 OK, record persisted, SMTP 'Email sent to ...' confirmed in backend logs). UI demo modal submits successfully and shows 'We've got it.' confirmation + 'Demo request received' toast. Customer-logos section renders 48 tags (16 logos × 3 marquee duplicates).

issues: Card under-name label uses `ag.role.replace(' Agent','')` which is a legacy transform. The new roles no longer contain ' Agent' but the .replace() is harmless. Consider removing the stale replace() for clarity.

critical_code_review_comments: AgentGallery.jsx pickReply token-overlap matcher works well: required `bestScore > 0` prevents false matches, sqrt-normalisation prevents long generic questions from dominating. Tested on 9 distinct topical probes and all returned on-topic answers.
/api/demo-request endpoint correctly excludes Mongo _id via projection in list endpoint (line 81). The POST stores via model_dump + isoformat conversion which is clean.

SMTP credentials are loaded correctly from /app/backend/.env; mailer logs 'Email sent to ['sales@plugdrop.ai', 'ps@plugdrop.ai', 'prashant.sharma@icssolutions.in']' confirming production mailing works.

Inputs in BookDemo modal have no `name` attributes — only placeholders. This is a minor a11y/testability gap; consider adding `name=` and `data-testid=` attributes to the demo form inputs for more robust automation.
AgentGallery.jsx (`a.role.replace(' Agent','')` line 246) is now dead code since the new role strings never contain ' Agent'. Safe to remove.
All 9 agent intros, role labels, channels, integrations, industries display correctly. No console errors.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: 4 TEST_ prefixed demo-request records inserted during testing (TEST_Agent QA, TEST_UI Demo, TEST_UI Demo2, TEST_UI Demo4). Safe to leave or purge via MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentKB rewrite is solid. The token-overlap matcher in AgentGallery.jsx (lines 7-46) reliably returns topically relevant Q&A. All 9 agents' cards/panels/intros/role labels work. SMTP from /api/demo-request is verified live (Hostinger smtp.hostinger.com:465). Demo modal inputs lack `name=`/`data-testid=` attributes — use get_by_placeholder() with 'Full name *', 'Work email *', 'Company (optional)', 'Phone (with country code) *' or fix the inputs first.
rca of the issue: N/A — this iteration was a feature/content rewrite, not a bug fix. No regressions detected.
